projects.title: Contact Form Handler
projects.description: Build a backend script to process HTML form submissions, validate user input, and simulate sending an email.

projects.title: Simple CMS
projects.description: Create a basic Content Management System that allows users to create, read, and delete simple text-based articles stored in files.

projects.title: User Login System
projects.description: Develop a secure authentication system featuring user registration, password hashing, and session-based login/logout.
